behavior_name: User can log in with valid credentials
acceptance_criteria: A valid email and password returns a session token and redirects to the dashboard

description: Bad credentials are refused without revealing which field failed
acceptance_criteria: An invalid password returns 401 with a generic error and no session token

behavior_name: Password reset token is single-use and expiring
description: Reset links must not be replayable
acceptance_criteria: An expired or already-used reset token is rejected with a clear error
